prompt:
Scene:
A square overhead botanical plate arranged as a luminous healing mandala on a pale natural-paper background, photographed with clean studio lighting that reveals petal veins, seed structure, pressed leaves, and fine gold guide lines. The composition should feel calm, restorative, and exact, with soft color intervals rather than theatrical contrast.

Subject:
A radial mandala built from medicinal herbs, sliced seed pods, flower petals, moss rosettes, dried roots, and translucent botanical membranes. The center begins with a compact blossom core, then expands into evenly spaced petal bands, circular herb clusters, leaf spokes, and tiny repeating seed constellations. Every ring must stay disciplined and symmetrical even though the source material is organic. Use sage green, pale rose, cream, muted amber, and touches of gold to unify the palette. The effect should suggest a botanical pharmacopoeia reorganized into meditative geometry.

Important details:
The key tension is organic irregularity controlled by radial order. Individual leaves and petals may retain natural texture, but their placement must be counted, mirrored, and clearly intentional. Preserve a readable center, middle bands, and outer protective ring. Avoid loose collage feeling. The image should look refined enough for an editorial science-art feature while still carrying a gentle sense of ritual healing and hand-arranged craft.

Use case:
Mandala Precision Geometry single study 6/8, testing whether living botanical textures can obey precise concentric structure without losing realism.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no bouquet composition, no random scattered herbs, no insects, no human hands, no vase, no medical labels, no flat clip-art leaves, no broken radial spacing.
title: Botanical Healing Mandala
description: A meditative botanical mandala that organizes herbs, petals, seeds, and roots into an exact concentric healing diagram.

generation.runner_notes: Independent mandala study using botanical specimens arranged into strict healing geometry.

en.title: Botanical Healing Mandala
en.description: A meditative botanical mandala that organizes herbs, petals, seeds, and roots into an exact concentric healing diagram.

zh-CN.title: 植物疗愈曼荼罗
zh-CN.description: 一张冥想感的植物曼荼罗，将草药、花瓣、种子与根系组织成精确的同心疗愈图。

alt.en: A radial healing mandala made from herbs, petals, roots, and seed pods on pale paper.
alt.zh-CN: 一张由草药、花瓣、根系和种荚组成的放射疗愈曼荼罗，铺陈在浅色纸面上。
